seo.title: Lighting Design & Services — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox provides full-spectrum lighting services — from environmental and stage lighting design and pre-visualization to lighting integration, programming, and live operation for events and installations.

og.title: Lighting Design & Services — BEATROX
og.description: Lighting that transforms spaces and elevates every moment — designed, programmed, and operated by Beatrox for events, concerts, and permanent installations.

hero.headline: Lighting Services
hero.subheadline: Lighting that transforms spaces and elevates every moment — designed, programmed, and operated by our experienced team.

body.content: Lighting is the invisible hand that shapes every experience. Whether it's a dramatic stage wash, an audio-reactive LED environment, or precision architectural illumination, Beatrox's lighting team designs systems that serve your vision — technically and aesthetically.

body.heading: Why Choose Beatrox
items: 15+ years of experience in live event production
Full-service team from design to strike
Trusted by Adidas, Netflix, CNN, Amazon Music

body.heading: Our Process
items: 1. Discovery Call — We learn your vision, venue, and budget
2. Design & Pre-Visualization — See your event before it happens
3. Equipment & Crew — We source everything and assign the right team
4. On-Site Execution — Professional setup, operation, and strike
5. Post-Event Review — We ensure everything exceeded expectations

body.heading: Ideal For
items: Trade show and convention booth lighting

body.heading: From Concept to Operation
body.content: Our lighting services begin at the design stage with full pre-visualization, allowing clients to see the lighting environment before a single fixture is hung. We then handle all integration, programming, and live operation — including DMX-controlled rigs, addressable LED systems, media server-driven content, and audio-reactive programming for immersive environments.

body.heading: DMX vs Addressable LED
body.content: DMX-controlled lighting is the industry standard for stage and event lighting, offering reliable, real-time control over individual fixtures through a standardized protocol. It's ideal for moving heads, PARs, and conventional stage rigs. Addressable LED systems, on the other hand, allow pixel-level control over LED strips and matrices, enabling complex animations, video content playback, and audio-reactive effects. Beatrox designs hybrid systems that combine the reliability of DMX with the creative flexibility of addressable LEDs for maximum impact.

body.heading: Benefits of Pre-Visualization
body.content: Pre-visualization allows you to see your lighting design before investing in equipment and crew. Using 3D rendering software, we model your venue, fixture placement, and cue timing — giving you a realistic preview of every look. This reduces on-site programming time, minimizes surprises, and allows for faster client approvals. For complex shows, pre-viz can save hours of expensive load-in time and ensure your creative vision is achieved exactly as planned.

body.heading: Applications
items: Trade show and convention booth lighting

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance for standard rentals and 8–12 weeks for custom productions. Last-minute requests are often accommodated depending on availability.

items.question: Do you travel outside Portland?
items.answer: Absolutely. While we're headquartered in Portland, OR, we regularly serve clients across the West Coast and nationwide for touring and large-scale events.

items.question: What's included in the rental?
items.answer: Every rental includes delivery, setup, on-site technical support, and strike. Custom packages can also include content design, pre-visualization, and dedicated project management.

items.question: Can you create audio-reactive lighting?
items.answer: Yes. We specialize in audio-reactive lighting systems using DMX, addressable LEDs, and media servers. Lights can respond to live audio, MIDI triggers, or timecode for fully synchronized immersive experiences.

items.question: Do you offer permanent installation lighting?
items.answer: Absolutely. We design and install permanent lighting for retail spaces, venues, architectural features, and brand environments — with ongoing maintenance and programming support.
